chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1238 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case For hearing of main case 06-10-2025 Mr. Ubedullah Malano, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional A.G Sindh. **** Learned AAG files compliance report on behalf of Deputy Commissioner, Naushahro Feroze, taken on record and copy whereof is provided to counsel or the petitioner. Counsel for the petitioner submits that, insofar as the prayer clause pertaining to the salaries is concerned, the grievance of the petitioner stands redressed as his salary has been released, and the process for payment of previous dues of salaries has also been initiated by the department. Accordingly, under instructions, he does not press the instant petition, and submits that if the petitioner feels aggrieved by his transfer or posting, he will avail the appropriate remedy before the Sindh Service Tribunal in accordance with law. Order accordingly. This petition is disposed of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
